$comment: Vetted MLX model catalog. Each entry pins a HuggingFace repo + revision (commit SHA) — the 'vetting' is that we picked these models, tested them on our reference hardware, and pinned the exact repo state. New revisions = new app release. See design.md §3.8. Note: Qwen3.5-2B-6bit on mlx-community is the VLM variant and SwiftLM b644's vision-tower expectations don't match its packaging — dropped until SwiftLM catches up or a non-VLM Qwen3.5-2B is published.

models.name: Qwen 3 · 1.7B (6-bit MLX)
models.tagline: Recommended. Sharp tool calling, fits 8GB comfortably.
